title: A Whiter Shade of Pale' Hybrid Tea Rose Bush, Award of Garden Merit Rose, Pale Pink Flowers 3fatpigs®
features: These are BARE ROOTED plants which can be planted from the end of October until May and will be dispatched as soon as the weather turns cold and they become dormant. The dispatch date depends on the Autumn temperature and varies from year to year.
A strong scent through summer and autumn

Growing Details: Common Name: A Whiter Shade of Pale, Foilage Deciduous, Mature Height 0.5-1m, Mature Spread 0.5-1m, Hardiness H6 (-20 to -15°C), Soil Type Chalk, Clay, Loam, Sand, Sun Exposure Full Sun, Soil pH Acid, Alkaline, Neutral
Produces the palest of pink blooms
description: Whiter Shade of Pale' grows to 1m in height and produces the palest of pink blooms with a strong scent through summer and autumn Hybrid Tea, or Large-flowered bush roses are upright, thorny shrubs with large, usually glossy leaves and large, double often fragrant flowers that may be solitary or in threes
